text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The annual summer camp is here! Kitasan Black
approaches Satono Diamond at the campground.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She tells her that she's thought about her fans and
their expectations, then announces that she's
decided to show everyone that she won't give up
and is going to keep running.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Satono Diamond smiles, telling her that's the Kita
she knows. The two of them encourage each other
to keep going.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Satono Diamond has a request for her summer
camp training—she wants to practice running
more powerfully.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She wants to be in top form for her race against
Mejiro McQueen, and she's got her eyes on racing
internationally someday as well. I agree to her
request.
